texto: We may say that the characters in fairytales are ‘good to think with’…[and that] the job of the fairytale is to show that Why? questions cannot be answered except in one way: by telling the stories. The story does not contain the answer, it is the answer.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brian Wicker que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “We may say that the characters in fairytales are ‘good to think with’…[and that] the job of the f…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fairy-tales, fantasy, com foco em fantasy e stories.

frase_original: We may say that the characters in fairytales are ‘good to think with’…[and that] the job of the fairytale is to show that Why? questions cannot be answered except in one way: by telling the stories. The story does not contain the answer, it is the answer.
